uiBuilder.label: Metrics Grid
uiBuilder.description: Lays a metrics array into a 12-column grid (width 25/33/50/75/100 maps to span 3/4/6/9/12), in order, wrapping with grid-auto-flow row dense, and renders the matching D3 chart component per metric (routing on viz_type). Collapses to a single column below a configurable width. Pure presentation — never fetches its own data.

properties.name: sections
properties.label: Data · Sections
properties.description: Array of dashboard sections — the resolver payload's `sections` (build spec §5.2). Each: { id, name, help_text, order, metrics: [...] }. Each section renders a collapsible header (name + optional help text + toggle) and a rule, then its metrics in the 12-col grid. Leave empty to fall back to the flat `metrics` array, then to built-in sample sections.

properties.name: metrics
properties.label: Data · Metrics (flat, fallback)
properties.description: Flat array of metrics — the resolver payload's `metrics` (build spec §5.2). Each item: { id, title, order, width, viz_type, display_config, data }. Used only when `sections` is empty: the grid wraps it into a single untitled section. The grid sorts by `order`, maps `width`→span, and renders the D3 chart matching each `viz_type`.

properties.name: columns
properties.label: Layout · Columns
properties.description: Number of grid columns. The width→span mapping (25/33/50/75/100 → 3/4/6/9/12) assumes 12; change only if you also rethink the mapping.

properties.name: gap
properties.label: Layout · Gap
properties.description: Gap between cards. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: collapseBelow
properties.label: Layout · Collapse below (px)
properties.description: When a section grid's own width is below this many pixels, every card collapses to full width (single column). 0 = never collapse.

properties.name: sectionsCollapsible
properties.label: Sections · Collapsible
properties.description: Allow each section header to collapse/expand its widgets on click.

properties.name: defaultCollapsed
properties.label: Sections · Start collapsed
properties.description: Render every section collapsed on first load. (Charts in a section that starts collapsed may need re-measuring on first expand.)

properties.name: animateSections
properties.label: Sections · Animate expand/collapse
properties.description: Animate the section expand/collapse (and help text) transition. Off = instant show/hide.

properties.name: sectionAnimationMs
properties.label: Sections · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the section collapse and help-text transitions, in milliseconds.

properties.name: helpDefaultVisible
properties.label: Sections · Help shown by default
properties.description: Whether each section's help text starts expanded. Off = hidden until the user clicks the ? button.

properties.name: showSectionHelpToggle
properties.label: Sections · Show help (?) button
properties.description: Render the ? button that toggles a section's help text. The button only appears when the section actually has help text.

properties.name: sectionNameColor
properties.label: Sections · Name color
properties.description: Section heading (and chevron) text color.

properties.name: sectionNameFontFamily
properties.label: Sections · Name font family
properties.description: Section heading font-family. Leave blank to inherit.

properties.name: sectionNameFontSize
properties.label: Sections · Name font size
properties.description: Section heading font size. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: sectionNameFontWeight
properties.label: Sections · Name font weight
properties.description: Section heading font weight (e.g. 400, 600, 700, bold).

properties.name: sectionHelpColor
properties.label: Sections · Help text color
properties.description: Color of the section help text.

properties.name: sectionHelpFontSize
properties.label: Sections · Help text font size
properties.description: Help text font size. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: helpIconColor
properties.label: Sections · Help (?) icon color
properties.description: Color of the ? help icon. The icon is hollow (outlined) when the help text is hidden and solid (filled with this color) when it is showing.

properties.name: ruleColor
properties.label: Sections · Rule color
properties.description: Color of the horizontal rule under each section header.

properties.name: ruleThickness
properties.label: Sections · Rule thickness (px)
properties.description: Thickness of the horizontal rule under each section header. 0 = hide the rule.

properties.name: sectionSpacing
properties.label: Sections · Spacing between sections
properties.description: Vertical gap between sections. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: vizMap
properties.label: Routing · Viz type → component
properties.description: Optional viz_type → chart-component-tag overrides, merged over the built-in map (e.g. {"column_chart":"x-1295779-column-chart-uic"}). Leave blank to use the defaults.

properties.name: showCardChrome
properties.label: Card · Show card chrome
properties.description: Wrap each metric in a card (background, border, radius, shadow). Off = bare cells.

properties.name: showCardTitle
properties.label: Card · Show card title
properties.description: Render each metric's title at the top of its card.

properties.name: cardBackground
properties.label: Card · Background
properties.description: Card background color (when card chrome is on).

properties.name: cardBorderColor
properties.label: Card · Border color
properties.description: Card border color (when card chrome is on and border width > 0).

properties.name: cardBorderWidth
properties.label: Card · Border width
properties.description: Card border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: cardRadius
properties.label: Card · Corner radius
properties.description: Card rounded corners. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: cardPadding
properties.label: Card · Padding
properties.description: Padding inside each card. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: cardMinHeight
properties.label: Card · Min height
properties.description: Minimum height of each card. CSS length; a bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: cardShadow
properties.label: Card · Drop shadow
properties.description: Apply a soft drop shadow to each card (when card chrome is on).

properties.name: emptyMessage
properties.label: Display · Empty message
properties.description: Text shown when there are no metrics to display.
